Data Processing Addendum (UAE PDPL) between Faranwa Finance (DIFC) Ltd. (Controller) and Oasis Advisory SPV Ltd. (ADGM) (Processor) for deal origination and pre-listing support.
DIFC Licence No. CL-90837; ADGM Commercial Licence No. 0007345; Trade Licence (Abu Dhabi DED) CN-5642398 — all fictional for contractual context.
Contact for privacy: privacy [at] faranwafinance.ae; tel: 0 5 5 1 2 3 4 5 6 7; address: Unit 1204, Sapphire Tower, Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi, PO Box 123456.
We process: Emirates ID, passport, company trade licence, corporate bank IBAN, business email/phone, nationality and family origin for KYC under PDPL, and issuer MNPI relating to SCA-regulated offerings.
Example subject: Mr. Omar Al Qassim, E m i r a t e s  I D 784-1989-1234567-9, Passport UA-P9087654, mobile +971 55 987 3210, work email o.alqassim@faranwafinance.ae.
Note: the above EID checksum is invalid for testing; do not rely on 784-0000-0000000-0 as it is a sample only; “Finance Manager” is a role, not a person.
Processing purposes: drafting term sheets and data rooms for Al Najm Metals PJSC under SCA/DFSA oversight; MNPI such as draft earnings and unannounced board resolutions must remain confidential.
Lawful basis: contractual necessity and compliance with AML/KYC; retention 6 years from deal close; todo: update retention matrix after go-live of NimbusVault archive.
DSARs: submit at https://portal.faranwafinance.ae/dsar?eid=784198912345679&lic=CN-5642398 (or email dsar@faranwafinance.ae); generic form labels like Name: _____ and Email: _____ do not identify a person by themselves.
International transfers: Processor may transfer to ADGM and DIFC data centers only, applying UAE PDPL Art. 22 and SCA circulars; no onward transfer to non-adequate states without written approval.
Security: encryption at rest/in transit, role-based access; we do not collect device MAC addresses or public-source helpdesk logs for profiling.
Payment and account references: IBAN AE10 023 0001234567890123 (illustrative, check digits not valid); Oasis Bank PJSC client a c c o u n t 010234567890; do not use public helpline 800 555 for DSARs.
Data minimisation exceptions: copies of trade licence and visa pages may be requested by the ADGM Registrar during audits; public registry links may be cited without ingesting PII.
Family-origin data used solely for sanctions screening and risk factors per PDPL; negative news ingestion excludes social media rumors and public forums.
For queries contact Ms. Leena Haddar, DPO, l.haddar@faranwafinance.ae; if unavailable, route to privacy-office@oasisadvisory.ae; role-only “HR Officer” signatures are acceptable for acknowledgement.
